Rules.Doping: Click Doping on your card, then choose a target. On yourself it lowers DC; on an opponent it raises DC.
Rules.Hand: Usually 3 techniques. Before the run, you can choose a signature technique, and it enters your hand only in rounds 1 and 3.
Rules.Win: Be the last one standing or finish round 3 with the fewest intoxication points.

Status.WaitingSignature: Player is choosing a signature technique...

Warnings.NoPlayers: Add at least one participant before starting.
Warnings.NotReady: All participants must choose and confirm a technique first.

Empty.Join: Drag actors in or mark them as participating before starting.

ath.name: Athletics
ath.flavorSuccess: {n} flips the mug in one powerful pull.
ath.flavorFailure: {n} underestimated the weight of the foamy projectile.

acr.name: Acrobatics
acr.successText: A random opponent draws only 2 cards.
acr.flavorSuccess: {n} drinks so deftly it looks like a circus act.
acr.flavorFailure: {n} loses the rhythm and gives up the pace.

thi.name: Thievery
thi.flavorSuccess: {n} quietly swaps mugs in the middle of the commotion.
thi.flavorFailure: {n} becomes the victim of their own scam.

ste.name: Stealth
ste.successText: Immune to hostile doping until the round ends.
ste.failureText: Enemy doping affects you twice as much.
ste.flavorSuccess: {n} hides the buzz behind icy calm.
ste.flavorFailure: {n} reaches for the mug far too obviously.

arc.name: Arcana
arc.flavorSuccess: {n} whispers a spell for a lucky gulp.
arc.flavorFailure: {n} sends the magic straight into someone else's mug.

occ.name: Occultism
occ.successText: Your next result gives 1 less IP.
occ.flavorSuccess: {n} drinks like they made a pact with the shadow of the bar.
occ.flavorFailure: {n} stares into the foam for too long and loses the thread.

rel.name: Religion
rel.flavorSuccess: {n} earns the blessing of the patrons of hops.
rel.flavorFailure: {n} hears an angry whisper from the gods in the mug.

nat.name: Nature
nat.flavorSuccess: {n} absorbs the malt hit with raw natural grit.
nat.flavorFailure: {n} cannot handle the wild nature of the drink.

soc.name: Society
soc.flavorSuccess: {n} delivers a toast so convincingly that the rivals hesitate.
soc.flavorFailure: {n} drags the speech out and loses focus.

dec.name: Deception
dec.flavorSuccess: {n} pretends to drink while ruining everyone else's plans.
dec.flavorFailure: {n} overacts and gives the trick away.

dip.name: Diplomacy
dip.successText: You and a random opponent lose 1 IP.
dip.failureText: The last target of your doping gains +1 doping.
dip.flavorSuccess: {n} smooths things over even at the loudest table.
dip.flavorFailure: {n} makes peace too late and feeds someone else's confidence.

itm.name: Intimidation
itm.successText: Transfer 1 IP to a random opponent.
itm.failureText: Take 1 IP from a random opponent.
itm.flavorSuccess: {n} presses so hard with a stare that the rival pales before the beer does.
itm.flavorFailure: {n} pushes too hard and becomes the target instead.

per.name: Performance
per.flavorSuccess: {n} turns a single gulp into a roaring tavern performance.
per.flavorFailure: {n} ruins the show and spills all the bravado.

med.name: Medicine
med.flavorSuccess: {n} knows exactly how to survive one more mug.
med.flavorFailure: {n} confuses treatment with an extra dose.

sur.name: Survival
sur.flavorSuccess: {n} endures as if this were swamp water instead of ale.
sur.flavorFailure: {n} realizes the body is no longer what it used to be.

crf.name: Crafting
crf.successText: Your next doping is boosted to 3.
crf.failureText: Your next doping is twisted by 3.
crf.flavorSuccess: {n} fine-tunes the chemical balance of the mug.
crf.flavorFailure: {n} mixes up the formula and gets a very strange cocktail.

prc.name: Perception
prc.flavorSuccess: {n} notices every extra bubble in a rival's glass.
prc.flavorFailure: {n} blinks at the wrong moment and the whole room smears.

lor.name: Alcohol Lore
lor.flavorSuccess: {n} identifies the brew by smell alone and catches the rush.
lor.flavorFailure: {n} solemnly calls a masterpiece cheap swill.

Text.HelpIntro: {title} is a three-round endurance race. Each round, a player chooses one technique, rolls a check, and gains intoxication points.
Text.HelpGoal: Goal: stay under your IP limit and finish the game with the fewest IP.
Text.HelpCrits: Critical success reduces IP gain and grants 1 doping. Critical failure increases IP gain and removes 1 doping.
